design_philosophy.identity: Community-focused, vibrant, and trustworthy second-hand auction platform for Spain & Canary Islands.
core_principles: Mobile-First: Design for the thumb zone first.
Clarity: Auctions move fast; information (price, time) must be instant.
Trust: Clean UI, verified badges, transparent history.
Vibrancy: Use the requested Teal/Orange to create energy, but keep the structural UI clean (White/Gray).

typography.usage_rules: Use Nunito for all Headings and Price displays (to make numbers look friendly). Use Inter for descriptions, forms, and metadata.

buttons.primary: bg-[#18b29c] hover:bg-[#149682] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#ffb347] hover:bg-[#ffa01a] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#18b29c] text-[#18b29c] hover:bg-[#18b29c]/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-[#18b29c] hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.auction: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all border border-slate-100 overflow-hidden group relative
cards.feature: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center
cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-2xl

badges.canarias: bg-[#ffb347]/10 text-[#ffb347] border border-[#ffb347]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1
badges.new: bg-[#18b29c] text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold
badges.time_sensitive: bg-red-100 text-red-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-1

visual_assets.logo_style: Text-based 'Lapopo' in Nunito ExtraBold, with the 'o's potentially stylized as coins or location pins. Primary color.
visual_assets.illustrations: Use simple, flat 2D vector illustrations for 'Sell in 3 steps' and empty states. Avoid complex 3D unless minimal.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure white text on Teal/Orange buttons is legible. Use dark text on light backgrounds always.
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (like 'Heart' or 'Search').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement Dark Mode toggle.
2. UI LIBRARY: Use Shadcn UI but HEAVILY customize the radius to be 'rounded-2xl' or 'rounded-full' to match the 'Lapopo' soft aesthetic. Do not use default sharp edges.
3. HEADER: Sticky header with blur. Mobile: Bottom navigation bar for 'Home', 'Search', 'Sell', 'Profile'.
4. AUCTION CARDS: Must show: Image (aspect-square), Title (truncate-2-lines), Current Bid (Big, Teal), Time Left (Red if <24h), 'Solo Canarias' badge (if applicable).
5. COUNTDOWN: Implement a real-time countdown component. It must tick.
6. FORMS: Break 'Create Auction' into a 3-step wizard (Details -> Photos -> Pricing/Duration).
7. EMPTY STATES: Use friendly illustrations when no bids or auctions are found.
8. LANGUAGE: ALL TEXT MUST BE IN SPANISH.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for text.
Avoid standard 'Bootstrap' grid looks. Use asymmetric grids where possible for featured items.
Buttons must have a 'click' feel (scale down slightly on active).
